name: c-level-skills
description: 32 C-level advisory skills + c-level-agents plugin layer (12 cs-* persona agents + 20 /cs:* slash commands). Complete virtual board of directors with CEO, CTO, COO, CPO, CMO, CFO, CRO, CISO, CHRO advisors plus General Counsel (contract risk scanner, term sheet analyzer), Chief Data Officer (AI training data audit, data product strategy, data asset valuator), Chief AI Officer (model build-vs-buy, AI risk classifier, AI cost economics), and Chief Customer Officer (retention decomposition analyzer, customer segmentation designer, CS coverage calculator), executive mentor, founder coach, Chief of Staff router, board meetings, decision logger, board deck builder, scenario war room, competitive intel, org health diagnostic, M&A playbook, international expansion, culture architect, change management, strategic alignment, and the founder-mode plugin (office-hours, boardroom, brief/decide/execute/post-mortem pipeline, cross-model consensus, decision freeze).
